title: Trump is railing over access to European bases for Iran war. But where are they?
summary_full: The US President claimed he could just "just fly in and use" jointly operated bases in Spain. Madrid has a wildly different interpretation of their agreement, and so do others
summary_public: The US President claimed he could just "just fly in and use" jointly operated bases in Spain. Madrid has a wildly different interpretation of their agreement, and so do others
